recurring_patterns.title: Example pattern
recurring_patterns.description: This is an example recurring pattern. Replace with your own.

recurring_patterns.title: Run full Post-Hole routine after every sprint
recurring_patterns.description: After filing the scorecard, it's easy to skip validate + review + common-issues.
recurring_patterns.prevention: Always run: slope validate on new scorecard; slope review (save to sprint-N-review.md); update common-issues if new patterns emerged.

recurring_patterns.title: Workspace packages must use workspace:* protocol for local deps
recurring_patterns.description: mcp-tools had @srbryers/core pinned to ^0.3.3 (npm), so TypeScript resolved the published version instead of the local workspace version with new exports.
recurring_patterns.prevention: Always use "workspace:*" for intra-monorepo dependencies. Check resolution with pnpm ls after adding new exports.

recurring_patterns.title: Core package needs @types/node when importing node: modules
recurring_patterns.description: Moving config.ts/loader.ts to core failed to compile because core didn't have @types/node — it had been a pure-logic package until now.
recurring_patterns.prevention: When moving files that import node:fs, node:path, etc. into a package, verify @types/node is in devDependencies.

recurring_patterns.title: better-sqlite3 native build requires pnpm onlyBuiltDependencies approval
recurring_patterns.description: pnpm ignores native build scripts by default. better-sqlite3 silently fails to compile, causing runtime errors. pnpm approve-builds is interactive and unusable in CI/agent contexts.
recurring_patterns.prevention: Add native packages to pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies in root package.json before running pnpm install.

recurring_patterns.title: Making sync functions async breaks callers that don't await
recurring_patterns.description: Changing initCommand from sync to async caused 5 CLI tests to fail — they called initCommand() without await, so assertions ran before the async work completed.
recurring_patterns.prevention: When converting a sync function to async, search all callers (tests, CLI entry points, other commands) and add await. In test callbacks, add async to the it() function.

recurring_patterns.title: tsconfig.json must exclude *.test.ts when tests live alongside source
recurring_patterns.description: store-sqlite had tests in src/index.test.ts. The default include: ['src/**/*.ts'] pulled test files into the build, causing type errors from test-only types to surface during tsc.
recurring_patterns.prevention: When placing test files in src/ alongside implementation, add 'src/**/*.test.ts' to the exclude array in tsconfig.json.

recurring_patterns.title: TypeScript strict mode rejects interface-to-Record<string,unknown> cast
recurring_patterns.description: SlopeConfig interface has no index signature, so TypeScript strict mode rejects `config as Record<string, unknown>`. The workaround is double-cast via unknown, but the real fix is adding the field to the interface.
recurring_patterns.prevention: When adding new config fields, add them to the SlopeConfig interface first (like roadmapPath). Avoid double-cast-via-unknown as a long-term pattern.

recurring_patterns.title: Async CLI commands need await/rejects in tests, not sync toThrow
recurring_patterns.description: When a CLI command is async and mocks process.exit, using `expect(() => fn()).toThrow()` silently passes because the promise rejection is unhandled. Tests appear to pass but assertions never execute.
recurring_patterns.prevention: For async CLI commands that call process.exit, use `await expect(fn()).rejects.toThrow()` with async test callbacks. This is related to pattern #6 (making sync functions async breaks callers).

recurring_patterns.title: Telemetry tables should not have FK constraints to session tables
recurring_patterns.description: Events table initially had REFERENCES sessions(session_id). This prevented inserting events with session IDs that don't exist in the sessions table (e.g., from external tools or after session cleanup).
recurring_patterns.prevention: Telemetry/event tables should be independent. Use indexes for query performance but avoid FK constraints that create coupling between telemetry producers and session lifecycle.

recurring_patterns.title: Lexicographic .sort() on sprint filenames breaks when sprint > 9
recurring_patterns.description: Array.sort() without a comparator sorts strings lexicographically. 'sprint-9.json' > 'sprint-20.json' because '9' > '2'. This caused slope review to show sprint 9 instead of 20.
recurring_patterns.prevention: Always use numeric comparator when sorting files with embedded numbers: .sort((a,b) => extractNum(a) - extractNum(b))

recurring_patterns.title: Vitest spy.mockRestore() clears mock.calls — read calls before restoring
recurring_patterns.description: vi.spyOn(console, 'log') captures calls, but mockRestore() wipes mock.calls. If you restore the spy before reading the captured calls, assertions see an empty array and tests silently pass or fail with unhelpful messages.
recurring_patterns.prevention: Always capture spy.mock.calls into a variable before calling spy.mockRestore(). Pattern: `const logged = spy.mock.calls.map(c => c[0]).join('\n'); spy.mockRestore(); expect(logged).toContain(...);`
